MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steve Ngo of Minami Tamaki, LLP, 788-9000, appearing for plaintiffs

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Ngo presented the Court with a stipulation to change venue to Santa Clara County. The Court did not affirm the tentative granting DEFENDANTS STACY DELLAMAR and DEREK DELLAMAR'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE and signed the order pursuant to stipulation to change venue to Santa Clara County.
